detail.description:
Trace letters to discover words! A casual word puzzle game!
Find words among the letters and clear stages!
Earn rewards based on the number of words you find! Play a lot to find words!

[Free Mode]
Clear stages and collect coins!
Clear a certain number of stages to earn rare words and coins!
In addition, the words you collect and rare words will be registered in your word list! Earn rewards based on the number of words you register!

[Daily Mode]
Earn more coins than usual when you complete dail
